# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<div class="blogCommentContainer" id="{{ $comment->id }}" style="@if(Auth::check()) background:#{{ Auth::user()->color }} url('".asset("img/icons/{!! Auth::user()->icon !!}')."' ) no-repeat left; @else #eee;"'}}" >
    <p><strong>Comment by:<br /> <small class="authorName">{{ $comment->name }} <i style="@if($comment->email_verified == 1) {color:#35b34a;}" {{-- Verification link --}}'class="validateEmail"' href="{{ route('mail.verify', [ 'token' => $comment->email_verification_token ]) }}" @else(){{ color:red }}@endif emailTo(id)</small><br /> <span class="date">{{ date("F j, Y", strtotime($comment->created_at)) }} <i style="@if(!empty ($comment->updated_at)){color:#f06523;}" {{-- Update time --}}'title="{{ $comment->updated_at }}"></span> <strong class="replyLink" onclick="_gaq.push(['_trackEvent', 'Comment', 'Reply']); window.location = this.parentNode.parentNode.getElementsByClassName('reply')[0].href;"{{-- Replying link --}}' href="#" id="{{ $comment->id }}"><i class="fa fa-reply mr5" aria-hidden="true"> </a>
        <!-- Comment Content Starts here, use {!! !!} to preserve the html formatting. It will allow Laravel's Blade templating engine to parse and display this content correctly --}} {{--{! $comment ->> 'content'} !}}  is not available in PHP for rich text comments or HTML tags inside a comment because it would be interpreted as blade syntax which we are preventing from displaying.
        </strong><br /> {!!  $comment->content !!}<!-- Comment Content Ends here -->  {{--{! $comment ->> 'user_id'} !}} is not available in PHP for rich text comments or HTML tags inside a comment because it would be interpreted as blade syntax which we are preventing from displaying.
    </p><br />{{!!  unlink($currentUser,  $comment) !!}}<!-- Unlink button --} on click="_gaq.push(['_trackEvent', 'Comment','Delete']); $('#{!unlinkButton->$parentNodeId')[0].click();"
    </div><br />{{-- Comment Reply Starts here: {{$comment['children']}} is not available in PHP for rich text comments or HTML tags inside a comment because it would be interpreted as blade syntax which we are preventing from displaying. --}}{{! $reply->>'content'} !}},
